scripts.test: pnpm --workspace-root run build && pnpm --workspace-root run desktop:build && cargo build --manifest-path ../../backend/service/Cargo.toml -p service-bin && playwright test
scripts.test:headed: pnpm --workspace-root run build && pnpm --workspace-root run desktop:build && cargo build --manifest-path ../../backend/service/Cargo.toml -p service-bin && playwright test --headed
